stemHtml:
Refer to figure or use CAP 698. Figure 4.7.
The Medium-Range Jet Transport aeroplane (MRJT) is scheduled to depart from Madrid airport.

Determine the brake release weight, given:

V1: 145 kt
Elevation: 1998 ft
Outside Air Temperature: + 38°C
Runway Slope: 0.2% DOWN
Wind: 5 kt tailwind

options.b: Significantly in excess of 68 000 kg.
options.d: The same as the structural take-off mass of 62 800 kg.
